source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A counterflowing heat exchanger has one line with 2 kg/s at 125 kPa, 1000 K entering, and the air is leaving at 100 kPa, 400 K. The other line has 0.5 kg/s water coming in at 200 kPa, 20\circ\text{C} and leaving at 200 kPa. What is the total rate of entropy generation?

The other line has 0.5 kg/s water coming in at 200 kPa, 20\circ\text{C} and leaving at 200 kPa. What is the total rate of entropy generation?
